21038455.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_A
21038455.transcript: Give it up! We won't back down!

24517380.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_FIRST
24517380.transcript: These machines are as good as broken!

31541373.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2200
31541373.transcript: Seofon! How about we turn up the heat?

39588771.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1300
39588771.transcript: We make for a speedy combination!

46449931.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_A_3
46449931.transcript: To think, we'll only continue to get better!

55721765.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0200
55721765.transcript: With you in the front line, it was easy!

76734482.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0600
76734482.transcript: It's all about the breath. Calm yourself and the rest will follow.

93739218.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_NP0300
93739218.transcript: Thanks. Your power is very interesting.

96675822.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0900
96675822.transcript: I'm nothing without a solid front line.

110009769.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_B
110009769.transcript: See if your blades can stop my arrows!

124934643.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0600
124934643.transcript: We're not out of the briars yet!

125030442.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_FIRST
125030442.transcript: He makes me wanna show off!

129044282.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_FIRST
129044282.transcript: Don't back down! We have nothing to fear!

138630448.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_NP0300
138630448.transcript: Don't act humble, Rolan. When your magic surpasses my own.

139627998.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_FIRST
139627998.transcript: I don't plan on losing today!

140008366.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1500
140008366.transcript: Strike fear into the hearts of our foes!

140516037.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0200
140516037.transcript: Get ready for the next target!

141478674.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0400
141478674.transcript: Concentration is key for both magic and archery, huh?

148325921.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1700
148325921.transcript: Get ready for the next one!

160424353.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_FIRST
160424353.transcript: Looks like we have our work cut out for us!

169588616.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0500
169588616.transcript: Huh. You noticed? One of my specialties.

170091944.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1300
170091944.transcript: All sword work and no sword play makes for a sad fisherman!

174053417.label: PL2300_vo_CMM_emo_pose_6
174053417.transcript: To the hunter go the spoils!

174394924.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2100
174394924.transcript: A huntress never lets her prey escape.

175155417.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1500
175155417.transcript: The snap of the fist, the twang of the bowstring! Beautiful!

180850839.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1800
180850839.transcript: So, where do you pull all those objects from?

181686522.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_B_3
181686522.transcript: This crew knows how to fight!

184950280.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_2_FIRST
184950280.transcript: Heh, I see through your tricks!

212204560.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_A
212204560.transcript: It doesn't matter how fast you are. You can't run!

215589778.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_3st_1_FIRST
215589778.transcript: I have a bad feeling about this.

225187142.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_C
225187142.transcript: I rest all my hopes on this shot!

229604625.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2200
229604625.transcript: No thanks to your slacking off.

233836342.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_FIRST
233836342.transcript: A giant should have far more weak points!

240375563.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1700
240375563.transcript: Likewise. I would hate to see what you can do with that scythe up close.

240617815.label: PL2300_vo_ETC_comeback_2
240617815.transcript: I won't miss. Not next time.

243181970.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1300
243181970.transcript: I am the best archer in the skies, you know!

271652921.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0500
271652921.transcript: Perhaps we should change your name to Oi-gun!

275328372.label: PL2300_vo_ETC_lockon_4
275328372.transcript: No prey can run from this huntress!

299654044.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_C
299654044.transcript: Don't stop now! Id's life is on the line!

301676608.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1700
301676608.transcript: Of course. Think nothing of it.

332369337.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1900
332369337.transcript: I think that goes both ways.

341233232.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_NP0300
341233232.transcript: Hello, Skyster Rolan! There are more battles to win!

346847762.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0500
346847762.transcript: Rely on them all you'd like!

358459603.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1200
358459603.transcript: I saw you needed the support.

377158544.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_B
377158544.transcript: Your back's against the wall! It's already over!

389129453.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_FIRST
389129453.transcript: Look at all these new targets!

409004202.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0000
409004202.transcript: You really capitalized on that strike, Captain!

413505904.label: PL2300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_finish
413505904.transcript: Right? This crew never fails to impress!

416587955.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1200
416587955.transcript: Don't they? If there's one thing I do well, it's wield the bow.

424412100.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_C
424412100.transcript: You've bothered us for the last time!

426491039.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2200
426491039.transcript: Right, and I would give your attitude a solid F.

448862561.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_9st_1_FIRST
448862561.transcript: It? No. You're something far more sinister.

453091924.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_FIRST
453091924.transcript: This place doesn't sit well with me. Let's hurry!

457689218.label: PL2300_vo_CMM_emo_squat_1
457689218.transcript: Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah!

457718330.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1400
457718330.transcript: Such dazzling skill! It's hard to look away!

460772068.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1600
460772068.transcript: Yes! Your spear and my bow are invincible!

461415154.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1200
461415154.transcript: I bet your his-story as a holy knight is storied indeed!

468939404.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2100
468939404.transcript: Angel feathers for fletching? Now those would be amazing arrows!

477935055.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0700
477935055.transcript: Your pet ghosts are so cute!

480016287.label: PL2300_vo_CMM_emo_pushup_1
480016287.transcript: Hah! Here goes! One! Two! Three! Four! Five! Six! Hah! Not bad!

486133057.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0300
486133057.transcript: They're really wracked with pain now!

492266244.label: PL2300_vo_NAV_get_snp_2
492266244.transcript: Don't worry, I usually hunt far bigger monsters.

499595093.label: PL2300_vo_NAV_throw_spear_reaction_1
499595093.transcript: I know someone who could teach you how to use that spear!

505197661.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0200
505197661.transcript: We're like two arrows in a quiver!

506801982.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_3
506801982.transcript: And I can still keep going!

509314462.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_C
509314462.transcript: Good work! On to the next!

513714278.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0700
513714278.transcript: Aww, that was a lovely compliment!

522095770.label: PL2300_vo_CMM_emo_squat_3
522095770.transcript: Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah!

527474833.label: PL2300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_3chain
527474833.transcript: Indeed! We make a fine team!

554387545.label: PL2300_vo_CMM_emo_pose_5
554387545.transcript: Trust me, my eyes see everything!

557681063.label: PL2300_vo_CMM_emo_boxing_3
557681063.transcript: Oh yeah! Hah! Huh! Yeah! Haha!

558936261.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1000
558936261.transcript: It's easier to find my target with such a bright beacon guiding me.

561862237.label: PL2300_vo_CMM_emo_win_3
561862237.transcript: That was easy! Nothing escapes my vision!

565844580.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_time_start
565844580.transcript: Ha! Who's ready to finish them?

570807776.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_B
570807776.transcript: I'll make you pay for it!

574063153.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0300
574063153.transcript: What kind of huntress would I be otherwise?

580300963.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_B
580300963.transcript: I think our crew makes the better team!

583540646.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0200
583540646.transcript: You see right through their every move!

586418591.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1000
586418591.transcript: Not before I shoot them between the eyes!

593150140.label: PL2300_vo_ETC_quest_clear_1
593150140.transcript: Heh-heh! They didn't stand a chance!

596886532.label: PL2300_vo_CMM_emo_pose_2
596886532.transcript: You stand before the Dark Huntress!

598592644.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1100
598592644.transcript: What kind of archer would I be if I couldn't?

606243775.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1400
606243775.transcript: For a butterfly, you're certainly a fierce ally!

609525671.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0900
609525671.transcript: At this rate, we'll run out of prey!

616555086.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_B_3
616555086.transcript: I'll give everything for this crew!

650619314.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_NP0300
650619314.transcript: Huh? You really rock and rollin' them, didn't you?

657773475.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1100
657773475.transcript: Your technique is brutal! Much more than I could ever pull off!

677675364.label: PL2300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_finish_2
677675364.transcript: Thanks! And that's not even a fraction of my power!

682824788.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1400
682824788.transcript: You know, your quiet power reminds me a lot of Ayato.

685515656.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0800
685515656.transcript: You almost fly faster than my arrows!

686758554.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_B
686758554.transcript: Let's cut him down to size!

691805372.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B
691805372.transcript: I like the way you think.

697173314.label: PL2300_vo_CMM_emo_squat_2
697173314.transcript: Huh! Huh! Huh! Ha! Huh! Huh! Ha! Huh! Ha! Huh! Huh! Heh-heh! Ha! Huh!

706194711.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0300
706194711.transcript: An archer never reveals her secrets.

706537088.label: PL2300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_fullchain
706537088.transcript: Heh! No one runs from me and gets away!

707353552.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1000
707353552.transcript: Hmm. I wonder if we could charge my arrows with your flames.

709641500.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1900
709641500.transcript: Heh, it's like you've never heard of the Eternals before.

715414692.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1900
715414692.transcript: Id, let's not let our egos get in the way.

744164122.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1000
744164122.transcript: You really know how to make sparks fly!

751819264.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_FIRST
751819264.transcript: Do we have what it takes to stand up to a god? Guess we'll find out!

753057083.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_A_2
753057083.transcript: I'll always lend you my aid.

758591286.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0600
758591286.transcript: They can run, but they'll never escape me.

763470205.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_B
763470205.transcript: His crew always finds a way!

766036519.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_A
766036519.transcript: I can see right through you!

766406306.label: PL2300_vo_NAV_enemy_overdrive_C
766406306.transcript: Don't take your eyes off the enemy!

768538527.label: PL2300_vo_CMM_emo_win_5
768538527.transcript: Ha! Victory belongs in the hands of the bold!

770853530.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_C
770853530.transcript: My arrows will pierce this darkness!

781634139.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0500
781634139.transcript: Well done! I could get used to support like that!

786823065.label: PL2300_vo_NAV_enemy_break_reaction_C
786823065.transcript: We'll stop them here and now!

786838277.label: PL2300_vo_NAV_enemy_overdrive_B
786838277.transcript: I think we made them angry!

787669156.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0400
787669156.transcript: Let's just focus on the battle for now.

808196646.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1600
808196646.transcript: Oh, oh! Is it prayers? You're so clever, Zeta!

818102545.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_A
818102545.transcript: Keep it up! We'll win this!

825430111.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1500
825430111.transcript: Hah! As expected of the legendary brawler!

825854510.label: PL2300_vo_CMM_emo_abs_1
825854510.transcript: Ugh! Right! In! Out! In! Out! Huh! All finished!

829484324.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_FIRST
829484324.transcript: I can't make out anything that looks like the catalyst!

831561701.label: PL2300_vo_ATK_ability_1_1
831561701.transcript: These eyes have never failed me!

835245904.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2100
835245904.transcript: Let's see if they can stand up to an eternal!

842206881.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1700
842206881.transcript: Trust me, the fight never leaves me.

850751301.label: PL2300_vo_CMM_emo_pushup_3
850751301.transcript: Hah! Let's do it! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! What a workout!

859898442.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0400
859898442.transcript: If anyone can do it, it's you. Would you like some tips?

860712369.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1500
860712369.transcript: I hope that's a good thing!

873652296.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_C
873652296.transcript: Now! Give it everything you've got!

877926180.label: PL2300_vo_CMM_emo_win_6
877926180.transcript: Hahaha! I told them there was no escape!

890842591.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_A
890842591.transcript: Could you two go bug some other crew?

896191241.label: PL2300_vo_CMM_emo_win_4
896191241.transcript: Well, well! We prevail yet again!

896615268.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_3st_1_FIRST
896615268.transcript: Let's make our way to the monastery.

902621717.label: PL2300_vo_ETC_lockon_5
902621717.transcript: Impede our path at your own peril!

908838173.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_B
908838173.transcript: The Dragon of Destruction! It certainly lives up to its name!

916161929.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_A
916161929.transcript: Bring your numbers! They won't save you!

917568986.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0800
917568986.transcript: Lancelot! Ready for the next fight?

945796333.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_3
945796333.transcript: Hehe, you weren't so bad yourself!

954606203.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2200
954606203.transcript: Our fearless leader does it again!

964794387.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_B
964794387.transcript: There's no prey I can't chase!

968425010.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0300
968425010.transcript: I know skill when I see it.

976847875.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_A
976847875.transcript: We don't have time for this!

977539554.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1400
977539554.transcript: Ooh, that was a very good try!

992649550.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_5_FIRST
992649550.transcript: Such overwhelming presence... We have to fight this thing?

997749570.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_FIRST
997749570.transcript: Hmph. A fight between monsters. How novel.

1003881649.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1100
1003881649.transcript: I'm sure YOU would be just fine!

1011061297.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0000
1011061297.transcript: I knew I could count on you, Captain!

1016535513.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0800
1016535513.transcript: We do what we must to turn the tide.

1023328894.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1100
1023328894.transcript: Well, we certainly gave them a night to remember!

1025858369.label: PL2300_vo_DMG_rise_1
1025858369.transcript: And I need to be careful!

1036727377.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_A
1036727377.transcript: Don't let this chance pass us by!

1043598653.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1200
1043598653.transcript: Charlotta, we already look up to you.

1064025838.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0400
1064025838.transcript: You really spelled their doom, Io!

1991787.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2400
1991787.transcript: Wow, Gallanza! You led a spirited charge back there!

14764845.label: PL2300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1600
14764845.transcript: I bet you're the best aerialist in the crew.

23304337.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2600
23304337.transcript: You haven't even seen my best tricks yet!

56235146.label: PL2300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2800
56235146.transcript: Agreed! But I'd expect nothing less from us.

81138726.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2600
81138726.transcript: Uh... well, that's not bad for a first try.

81933560.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2500
81933560.transcript: I love the way you word things. Always so fancy.

112704562.label: PL2300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1400
112704562.transcript: I bet you could cut a raindrop clean in half!

133298213.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2700
133298213.transcript: Even lone wolves hunt in a pack from time to time.

150681888.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2900
150681888.transcript: Amazing! You can follow all of my attacks!

231807813.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2600
231807813.transcript: I'm glad I can count on you!

243968336.label: PL2300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0900
243968336.transcript: No, my compliments to the chef!

268113713.label: PL2300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0700
268113713.transcript: Let's keep it up, Ferry and friends!

276869253.label: PL2300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0200
276869253.transcript: Would you say that Aries is an aerial fighter?

278183412.label: PL2300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1100
278183412.transcript: Best to stay alert until the battle's over. Never know what might happen.

321618636.label: PL2300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1700
321618636.transcript: I could use more of your support, Vaseraga!

324619861.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2900
324619861.transcript: Yep! There's no prey that can outrun these bad boys!

353253892.label: PL2300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0900
353253892.transcript: So Vane, let us turn up the beat for the next one!

358627934.label: PL2300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0000
358627934.transcript: Well, well. Someone's jumped up a notch.

375341669.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2500
375341669.transcript: A huntress must earn her keep, after all.

385318997.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2900
385318997.transcript: Oh, uh... when you put me on the spot like that, I can't think of any.

388071673.label: PL2300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1200
388071673.transcript: Your brilliant attacks are a bit harsh on my sensitive eyes.

416416466.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2800
416416466.transcript: Thank you. But I think I still have room to grow.

417710848.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2500
417710848.transcript: Hehe, I always make my point, don't I?

419139445.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2500
419139445.transcript: I guess swordsmancers use cutting-edge magic!

468681767.label: PL2300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2200
468681767.transcript: Bossman of the Eternals or flop mess of the Eternals? You be the judge!

477754167.label: PL2300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0200
477754167.transcript: Your technique was equally as impressive!

520868854.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2900
520868854.transcript: We really threaded the needle on that one, didn't we?

523693784.label: PL2300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0800
523693784.transcript: Lancelot! Did you become a fine knight by lancing a lot?

548480097.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2800
548480097.transcript: Ooh, good one! But, uh, feels like you've taken my job!

589968079.label: PL2300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1900
589968079.transcript: Actually, maybe someday I should test my limits.

598035083.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2600
598035083.transcript: Sometimes I feel like you're a bit too risky.

608887624.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2800
608887624.transcript: Having allies at your side really makes you feel more confident.

649229255.label: PL2300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1300
649229255.transcript: Not fishing for compliments, but we were great!

658683745.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2400
658683745.transcript: Punch the front line? The punchline! You must be good at landing jabs!

661250033.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2800
661250033.transcript: Can't sacrifice on opening! Even the tiny ones!

666140196.label: PL2300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1400
666140196.transcript: Would you like me to demonstrate?

686900715.label: PL2300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0400
686900715.transcript: Aw, no, Io! I liked it!

704827221.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2700
704827221.transcript: Always wondered how Flamewrath works? Then it struck me!

706777108.label: PL2300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1300
706777108.transcript: My jokes don't always land as often as I'd like.

720377929.label: PL2300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1100
720377929.transcript: Nothing escapes you in battle, does it, Siegfried?

731727685.label: PL2300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1700
731727685.transcript: Just happy to be of service!

780132108.label: PL2300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0700
780132108.transcript: And not a single one missed the mark!

782393376.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2400
782393376.transcript: Despite both being spearmen, you and Anra couldn't be more different.

804982219.label: PL2300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1500
804982219.transcript: Well, hopefully I live up to your lofty expectations.

815914519.label: PL2300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1500
815914519.transcript: Our Ghandagoza is a masterful gondago-getter!

818818558.label: PL2300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2900
818818558.transcript: Nothing escapes my sight, even in the dark.

823084918.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2700
823084918.transcript: They just don't compare to us, do they?

833198589.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2800
833198589.transcript: So, Fraux, you really doubled the playing field out there!

843649675.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2400
843649675.transcript: Snap out of it! We're still busy here!

852119880.label: PL2300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2500
852119880.transcript: I'm always aware of my surroundings. Go nuts!

888204571.label: PL2300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2600
888204571.transcript: Your affinity with Imbrask is plain as day.

888753476.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2700
888753476.transcript: Even after all the puns I've made...

904529067.label: PL2300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1000
904529067.transcript: Were you named Percival because you persevere?

916365087.label: PL2300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2200
916365087.transcript: Lovely! Next time, I'm gonna go for one two A and T!

939886713.label: PL2300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2100
939886713.transcript: You make the sky's best bait!

952274778.label: PL2300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0800
952274778.transcript: What? Do you think I'm an eternal because it's my hobby?

1003322660.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2700
1003322660.transcript: A little faster on the trigger if you would.

1046395993.label: PL2300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1800
1046395993.transcript: Your earth-shattering genius was simply... earth-shattering!

1058208083.label: PL2300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2700
1058208083.transcript: Flamek's Thunderbolts sure are stunning to look at.

1064581820.label: PL2300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0500
1064581820.transcript: Hehe, you know you love my puns!

1068130167.label: PL2300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2500
1068130167.transcript: The resonance of blade and arrow! Music to my ears!

498139050.label: PL2300_vo_CMM_emo_onigiri_1
498139050.transcript: How 'bout a quick bite? Mmm! Mmm! Mmm! Mmm! Mmm! Mmm! Amazing!

939121767.label: PL2300_vo_CMM_emo_onigiri_2
939121767.transcript: I'm so hungry! Ow! Mm! Mm! Ow! Ow! Mm! Ow! Much better!
